key.plot.update_chunks: Update Chunks in Orthographic Camera View
panel.plot.extension_enable_first: Enable plugin '%s' first to use its features
panel.plot.gallery_no_items: No gallery items match the filter
screen.plot.title: Plot Designer
tool.plot.annotation.desc: Add dimension, angle, radius, and area annotations.
tool.plot.arc.desc: Draw arcs using multiple construction modes.
tool.plot.array.desc: Create rectangular, polar, or path arrays of shapes.
tool.plot.catenary.desc: Draw catenary curves for sagging arc structures.
tool.plot.circle.desc: Draw circles using common circle definition modes.
tool.plot.ellipse.desc: Draw ellipses using different construction modes.
tool.plot.eraser.desc: Delete shapes individually or by dragging.
tool.plot.extend.desc: Extend shapes to a specified boundary.
tool.plot.freedraw.desc: Draw freehand paths to quickly capture irregular lines.
tool.plot.line.desc: Draw straight lines with snap and angle constraints.
tool.plot.mirror.desc: Mirror selected shapes across an axis.
tool.plot.move.desc: Move selected shapes to a target position.
tool.plot.offset.desc: Offset shapes at a fixed distance.
tool.plot.polygon.desc: Draw polygons by placing consecutive vertices.
tool.plot.polyline.desc: Draw polylines and paths as straight or curved segments.
tool.plot.rectangle.desc: Draw rectangles with common input modes and square constraints.
tool.plot.select.desc: Select shapes for editing, multi-select, move, and batch operations.
tool.plot.sine.desc: Draw sine curves and adjust amplitude, wavelength, and phase.
tool.plot.spiral.desc: Draw spirals with multiple types and parameters.
tool.plot.spline.desc: Draw spline curves using fit or control-point modes.
tool.plot.star.desc: Draw star shapes and adjust star parameters.
tool.plot.transform.desc: Perform combined transform operations on selected shapes.
tool.plot.unknown.desc: Unknown tool type. Check tool configuration.
tool.plot.align.hint: Select multiple shapes, then choose an align/distribute mode. Common modes can be switched quickly with shortcuts.
tool.plot.annotation.hint: Choose an annotation type first, then pick geometry objects or key points as prompted.
tool.plot.arc.hint: Click key arc points in the current mode (start, end, control/radius) to finish the arc. Right-click cancels the current step.
tool.plot.array.hint: Select shapes first, then set array parameters (rectangular/polar/path) and confirm to generate copies.
tool.plot.break.hint: Select a shape, then specify one or two break points according to the current mode. Esc cancels the break flow.
tool.plot.catenary.hint: Click both endpoints first, then drag or enter parameters to adjust sag before confirming the catenary.
tool.plot.chamfer.hint: Select two objects in order and create a chamfer with the configured distance. Right-click confirms, Esc cancels.
tool.plot.circle.hint: Click to define the center and radius or key points in the current mode. Right-click cancels the current step.
tool.plot.ellipse.hint: Click to define major/minor axes or center and axis points in the current mode. Right-click cancels the current step.
tool.plot.eraser.hint: Left-click to delete a single shape, or drag to erase shapes along the path.
tool.plot.extend.hint: Select a boundary first, then click the shape to extend. The tool chooses the appropriate extend mode automatically. Esc cancels.
tool.plot.fillet.hint: Select two objects in order and create a fillet with the configured radius. Right-click confirms, Esc cancels.
tool.plot.freedraw.hint: Hold the left mouse button to draw freely and release to finish the current stroke.
tool.plot.line.hint: Click start and end points to draw a line. Hold Shift to constrain to horizontal, vertical, or 45°.
tool.plot.mirror.hint: Select shapes first, then click two points to define the mirror axis. You can keep the original shape in options.
tool.plot.move.hint: Select shapes first, then click base and target points to move. Shift constrains orthogonally; Esc/right-click cancels.
tool.plot.offset.hint: Left-click a shape and specify the offset side. Multiple offset mode can be enabled for continuous offsets.
tool.plot.polygon.hint: Click to add vertices continuously. Double-click or press Enter to finish. Right-click undoes the current step.
tool.plot.polyline.hint: Click to add nodes to form a polyline. Double-click or press Enter to finish. Right-click ends the current segment.
tool.plot.rectangle.hint: Click corner or center points in the current mode. Hold Shift to constrain to a square.
tool.plot.rotate.hint: Select shapes first, then click the rotation center and reference direction, and set the target angle.
tool.plot.scale.hint: Select shapes, then click the center and reference points to scale. Shift keeps proportions; Esc cancels.
tool.plot.select.hint: Left-click to select a shape or drag to box-select. Hold Shift to add to selection and Ctrl to deselect.
tool.plot.semicircle.hint: Click key points in the current mode to create a semicircle. Right-click cancels the current input.
tool.plot.sine.hint: Click to define the baseline range, then drag or adjust amplitude, wavelength, and phase in options.
tool.plot.spiral.hint: Click the start or center point and drag to set size, then finish according to the current spiral mode.
tool.plot.spline.hint: Click to add control points, then press Enter or right-click to finish and generate the spline.
tool.plot.star.hint: Click the center and drag to set the outer radius, then confirm vertex count/ratio to finish the star.
tool.plot.text.hint: Click or drag to place a text object and enter content. Adjust text style and input mode in the property panel.
tool.plot.transform.hint: Select shapes first, right-click to enter transform mode, then drag control points to scale/rotate. Shift constrains proportionally; Esc exits.
tool.plot.trim.hint: Select a boundary first, then trim. C/F switch trim modes, Shift enables continuous trim, Esc cancels.
tool.plot.unknown.hint: Left-click to draw or edit. Right-click cancels the current step.
dialog.plot.angle_step_help: Enter an integer between 1 and 90. Press Enter to confirm, or double-click the slider to open this panel again.
dialog.plot.layer_name_error: Please enter a valid layer name (Chinese, letters, numbers, or underscores).
dialog.plot.name: Name
dialog.plot.new_category_hint: Enter a new category name and confirm to add it.
dialog.plot.projection_elevation_help: Currently projecting to Y=%d, adjustable from -64 to 320.
dialog.plot.projection_ground_help: Projects shapes onto the ground surface.
mode.plot.pen: Pen Mode - Click anchors, drag for curve control points
mode.plot.polyline: Polyline Mode - Click to add straight segments
mode.plot.spline_control: Control-Point Mode: points influence curve shape
mode.plot.spline_fit: Fit Mode: curve passes through all points
plugin.road.select_path_hint: Select a path shape for road generation
plugin.road.draw_path_hint: Use drawing tools to create a path (polyline, freehand, or spline)
settings.plot.shortcuts_conflict: Shortcut %s conflicts with action [%s]; old binding removed.
settings.plot.shortcuts_hint: Single keys (L, P, C, R, E, S, A, Space) switch tools quickly; combos (Ctrl+Z/Y, Ctrl+N) are global actions. Hold Shift for orthogonal/angle constraints while drawing or editing.
settings.plot.shortcuts_no_default: This action has no preset default shortcut
settings.plot.shortcuts_recording: Recording shortcut: %s (Backspace to clear, Esc to cancel)
settings.plot.snap_display_help: Object Snap (OSnap) and feedback settings: control endpoint/midpoint/centroid snap hints and display styles.
snap.plot.settings_help: Enable snap targets, constraints, and preview options as needed. Changes take effect immediately. Hold Alt to toggle radius units.
tool.plot.fill.desc: Fill closed shapes with a solid color or pattern.
tool.plot.fill.hint: Select a closed shape, then choose fill options in the property panel.
tool.plot.stretch.desc: Stretch selected shapes along an axis.
tool.plot.stretch.hint: Select shapes first, then specify the stretch axis and distance.
layer.plot.delete_confirm_single: Are you sure you want to delete layer "%s"?
layer.plot.delete_confirm_multiple: Are you sure you want to delete %d selected layers?
layer.plot.cannot_delete_only: Cannot delete the only remaining layer
layer.plot.select_to_delete: Please select layers to delete first
layer.plot.must_keep_one: At least one layer must remain
layer.plot.cannot_delete_locked: Cannot delete locked layer: %s. Unlock it first.
layer.plot.delete_failed: Failed to delete layer. Please try again.
dialog.plot.projection_ground_mode_detai: Ground mode projects results at the default surface height.
dialog.plot.projection_elevation_mode_de: Elevation mode projects results to a manually set height level.
dialog.plot.linetoblock_full_help: Full conversion keeps all blocks covered by the shape.
dialog.plot.linetoblock_simplified_help: Simplified conversion filters small areas by coverage threshold: outline uses coverage length, fill uses cell coverage ratio.
dialog.plot.linetoblock_fill_enabled_hel: Closed shape interior fill is enabled.
dialog.plot.linetoblock_fill_disabled_he: Only the outline of closed shapes is converted.
dialog.plot.linetoblock_simplify_thresho: Outline filtered by coverage length, fill areas by cell coverage ratio; current threshold is %.2f.
Only converts lines whose coverage length exceeds %.2f times the block edge length.
settings.plot.help_select_topic: Click a topic on the left to view the tutorial
settings.plot.help_basic_select: Select: Press Space to switch to the select tool. Drag to box-select multiple elements.
settings.plot.help_basic_move: Move: Drag selected objects directly, or enter precise displacement values.
settings.plot.help_basic_zoom: Zoom view: Use scroll wheel to zoom; hold middle mouse button to pan the canvas.
settings.plot.help_advanced_shift: Hold Shift: Enable orthogonal/angle constraints while drawing or editing for clean geometry.
settings.plot.help_advanced_snap: Snapping: Enable endpoint/midpoint/perpendicular snap for faster positioning.
settings.plot.help_advanced_edit: Editing tip: Use the select tool first to locate objects, then switch to the edit tool to reduce mistakes.
settings.plot.help_troubleshoot_conflict: When a shortcut conflict occurs, the system shows the occupied action and removes the old binding.
settings.plot.help_troubleshoot_invalid: If shortcuts do not work: make sure no input field is focused and check for mod conflicts.
settings.plot.help_troubleshoot_esc: Press Esc while recording a shortcut to cancel immediately.
settings.plot.changelog_table: Settings page migrated to Table API; column widths are more stable with grouping.
settings.plot.changelog_recording: Shortcut recording improved: conflict hints, recording highlight, and clear button.
settings.plot.changelog_display: Display feedback page split into basic settings and color customization sections.
settings.plot.display_marker_hint: Tip: Marker size and color affect snap feedback in both drawing and editing tools.
settings.plot.display_color_hint: Different snap points can use different colors; changes apply immediately.
settings.plot.snap_color_reset_tooltip: Restore default color for this item
settings.plot.snap_help_center_point: Center point snap: snap to the geometric center of circles or arcs.
settings.plot.snap_help_centroid:
Centroid snap: snap to the geometric center of closed polygons.
Useful for quickly locating the overall center of complex shapes.
settings.plot.snap_help_center_color: Center color: used for circle center/center point snap hints.
settings.plot.snap_help_perpendicular: Perpendicular snap: drop a perpendicular from the current point to the target line and snap to the foot.
settings.plot.snap_help_tangent: Tangent snap: snap to the contact point tangent to the target curve.
